name: Beijing Aerospace Changfeng Co., Ltd
summary: Beijing Aerospace Changfeng Co., Ltd engages in the security technology, Internet of Things technology and application, medical equipment, and engineering businesses in China. It offers technology systems for safe and smart city, events security, emergency counter-terrorism, and national border defense; information technology solutions for public security and police; and safe production and medical information solutions. The company also designs, develops, produces, and sells waste treatment equipment. In addition, it offers digital integrated operating rooms, clean operating rooms, and environmental engineering services, as well as technology consulting, systems integration, and operational services. Beijing Aerospace Changfeng Co., Ltd is based in Beijing, China.
